title: 8 1 195190 im tab iberia en
text:
Consumer Protection Cooperation (CPC) network action on airlines’ COVID-19 related cancellation practices
Implementation table submitted by Iberia
Date: 30/March/2022
[NB: The Commission and CPC authorities may decide to publish this implementation table]
In the context of the CPC network’s coordinated investigation into airlines’ COVID-19 related cancellation practices, 16 major
airlines operating on the EU market have made wide-ranging commitments to clear their reimbursement backlogs, offer cash
reimbursement for unused vouchers that had been pushed on consumers in the early stages of the pandemic and better inform
consumers about their cancellation-related passenger rights.1
This implementation table outlines the commitments made by Iberia, the measures taken by Iberia to implement its
commitments, the state of play of implementation as well as any issues encountered by Iberia that still need to be resolved in
order to achieve full implementation.
